title: After the St. Lite Kinen: Sixth Sense

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Trainer, I did it...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It certainly wasn't easy... But I... still have some
strength left in my legs.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe follows her strong performance
with an exhausted smile... but it seems her body
really has toughened up over the summer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Is the Kikuka Sho really on the cards? I decide to
ask Agnes Tachyon for her thoughts on
Manhattan Cafe's post-race condition.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oho, I see! A twinkle in Cafe's eye! Judging by the
dilation of her capillaries, amongst other things,
I'd have to say...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: It's fifty-fifty.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Fifty-fifty... So basically, you don't know?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Well, really, those are two different statements. We do know that you've got a fifty-fifty chance.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Her stamina does look to be stable. The most
concerning factor, however...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Is her toenails. They're as brittle as ever. If you
don't think the decision through properly, Cafe
could end up...
WUHHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bang! Bang! Bang!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A cry beyond any voice pierces my mind, leaving
my very soul rattled. A savage force is suddenly—

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? What...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I can't... make out what she's saying... But it feels
very...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a voice incomprehensible to even Manhattan
Cafe. But there's no mistaking what it's trying to
say.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Keep... go...ing.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A presence that has guided Manhattan Cafe
through thick and thin. But that same presence
has tried to drag her into a deep sea too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Should we trust her?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I want to compete in the Kikuka Sho. If my friend
is calling out to me, then... as soon as possible, I'd
like to...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'll consider it. She's in better condition than she
was in summer, and with the right medical care,
we should be able to do something about her
nails. In which case...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her friend's voice slightly sways my judgment as
her trainer.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha, there's no telling whether any of this is
scientific or unscientific. At this point we can't
even make a clear distinction between the two.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And yet you two are using some sort of sixth
sense to compete in the Twinkle Series? Hahaha...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Perish the thought. I'm only on this path with you
because I trust in Cafe and her potential.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I have no intention at all of obstructing that
potential. If it's within the margin of error, let's
act on your whim and take the risk.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hahaha, go, Cafe! And show me. Show me the very first results of your Plan B!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...This isn't some sort of experiment. But...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I will go... to the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next steps are decided unanimously, and
Manhattan Cafe finally sets her sights on the G1
and the Kikuka Sho.
